positive: Highly detailed, centered illustration of a whimsical, bioluminescent celestial garden. The scene features intricately intertwined root systems, stylized glowing flowers, floating arcane symbols, and celestial elements like crescent moons. Style is a fusion of Art Nouveau graphic design and scientific illustration, emphasizing thick, clean linework and strong silhouettes. The primary color palette is deep midnight blue and emerald green, dramatically contrasted by electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and gold glowing accents. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical, highly balanced, and designed for optimal print-on-apparel readability. Minimal shading, maximum contrast, vector art quality, 8K, perfect symmetry, studio lighting.
negative: blurry, noisy, fuzzy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, poorly drawn, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, muted colors, grayscale, logos, trademarks
